A [[TIE pilot]] operating under the [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] '''DS-73-3''' served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] by<ref name="CSWE" /> [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> DS-73-3 participated in the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]],<ref name="CSWE" /> where the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] attempted to destroy the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|DS-1 Orbital Battle Station]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]],<ref name="NEC" /> and numerous [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] attempted to defend the Imperial [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]] from the attacking Alliance [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. Ultimately, the Battle of Yavin ended with an Alliance victory and the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star's]] destruction.<ref name="ANH">{{Film|IV}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:DS-73-3.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The image used by the ''A New Hope'' set of the ''Star Wars Trading Card Game'' to represent DS-73-3]]
The name "DS-73-3" was coined in [[2002]], in [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s [[A New Hope (TCG)|''A New Hope'']] expansion of the ''[[Star Wars Trading Card Game]]''. Identified on the card as the TIE fighter,<ref name="TCG">{{TCG|set=A New Hope|cardname=TIE Fighter DS-73-3|link=https://swtcg.com/Content/Images/Cards/ANH/TIE_Fighter_DS_73_3.webp?v=2}}</ref> the [[2008]] ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' would instead identify DS-73-3 as the fighter's [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]].<ref name="CSWE" /> This article assumes the later source is correct.

Furthermore, the DS-73-3 ''Star Wars Trading Card Game'' image shows a TIE fighter<ref name="TCG" /> which was destroyed by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] from aboard the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] during that [[Light freighter/Legends|ship's]] escape from the DS-1 Orbital Battle Station in a scene from the [[1977]] [[original trilogy]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], that takes place prior to the film's later Battle of Yavin scenes.<ref name="ANH" /> This contradicts ''The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia'', which lists DS-73-3 as a TIE pilot active during the Battle of Yavin.<ref name="CSWE" /> This article treats ''The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia'' as the accurate source and as such avoids linking DS-73-3 to any of the onscreen TIE fighters in ''A New Hope''.
